content:
Sorry a little late on this. I really enjoyed the 2 year anniversary overall. It felt very rewarding to log in.

My main problem with the anniversaries is how much they require you to play in order to get rewards that you want. After the last half anniversary, i had to take a break from the game for a little because i was so burnt out by playing so much. And during the most recent anniversary i paced myself a bit better and therefore was much less burnt out by the end. 

However, i didn't manage to complete Arc 2 chapter 4 in time to get the last 50 pulls from the event. I basically skipped 90% of the story because i had to in order to get close to finishing. And I'm glad that was an option because it's actually a very enticing reward. I had been putting off the story forever because i was struggling to get into it before the translations improved. But I was like 2 stages from finishing Arc 2 Chapter 4. And that's a bummer ngl. 

Also that model of limited promotions that require extensive story progress dissuades me from spending money to double the pulls. Like if I spent money and didn't get all the rewards, i'm gonna be disappointed. So i waited to see if i finished in time and I did not finish, so i did not spend money on that.

I would love if the 200 pulls for completing up to Arc 2 chapter 4 were made permanent and rolled into the existing milestone rewards for all players. It gives a lot of motivation to work through the story content. And making it permanent would benefit new players and give them a reason to get invested in the game. It also lets people complete the story at their own pace, which gives people time to read the whole story as it was intended to be read. additionally it's good for speedrunners if they want to speedrun with a new account.
the new paid banner (960 price) is terribad, not pulling

同上
上次不只限制打到星辰4的人才能拿紫球道具，一般剛玩的玩家 根本無可能拿的到
這次活動也是根本的"垃圾"活動，紫球還要限制這麼多才能拿到  拜託你們策畫看看別的遊戲 限制等級擴充的道具 在他們活動裡面的門檻好巴?

別人遊戲(例如FGO 拿聖杯) 或者其他遊戲RTA 或者是什麼高端PK類的 & 深淵分數比拚 都是給高位玩家 皮膚跟框框 讓他們顯擺

你們這樣搞我們一般玩家，就擺明喔  這次活動沒你們的份  高養成高配置才能參加喔~

喔對 在下雖然不才 至少也支持過這款遊戲 這期跟上期紫球禮包都拉光光，我可不是乾著嘴無課在懟
I wanna new(old) realm paid banner <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>  (1 arc1 unit, 1 arc2 unit and 3 WoD)
